verdict.summary: Round 6 resolves the prior major finding. The primer now includes a cargo test --no-run wasm32 invocation for every wasm-pack test package/feature state in ci.yml, covering the test/dev dependency closures that were previously omitted. The new structural guard compares build, clippy, and test state sets in both directions, refuses a vacuous target extraction, and its self-test explicitly proves that dropping a test/dev state is detected. The workflow states shown in the diff match the target wasm-pack states, including default/shacl/jsonld/explain-json, reason default/explain, RSP, text, SHACL default/shacl-af, introspect, and Solid. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security defect remains in the diff-scoped change.
